aboutPage.title: About Luka Piplica — IT Support & Systems Specialist

hero.description: A hands-on IT professional who thrives at the intersection of corporate tech support, enterprise system administration, network reliability, and progressive security practices.

aboutPage.typingWords: IT Support Specialist,Systems Administrator,Network Administrator,Cybersecurity Enthusiast,Open Source Contributor

background.title: Systems specialist with a precision electronics foundation
background.desc1: I started in electronics — designing circuits, soldering multi-layer PCBs, and programming Arduino microcontrollers. Three consecutive national championship wins in embedded systems gave me a deep appreciation for hardware diagnostics, low-level engineering, and execution precision.
background.desc2: That foundation naturally transitioned into network administration through intensive CCNA training at ITAcademy, corporate IT support at BHRT, and practical systems hardening. Navigating BHRT's old-school, purely manual infrastructure provided an exceptional hands-on trial by fire in pure system diagnostics. Today, my professional roadmap focuses on scaling from robust corporate support and server management directly into specialized enterprise cybersecurity roles.
background.card1Desc: CCNA-trained Network Administrator, Linux/Windows sysadmin, and corporate IT support professional focused on infrastructure reliability and progressive systems hardening.
background.card2Desc: An AI collaborator that helps me review automation scripts, optimize system workflows, and build custom Model Context Protocol (MCP) integrations.

process.title: Engineering Philosophy
process.description: Applying rigorous engineering discipline and automated workflows to build resilient, secure, and observable enterprise systems.
process.v1Desc: I architect systems with a 'Zero Trust' mindset, ensuring that security is baked into the infrastructure from day one. By leveraging threat modeling, automated compliance auditing, and infrastructure-as-code principles, I eliminate manual vulnerabilities and enforce proactive, immutable system integrity.
process.v2Desc: Backed by national-level success in electronics, rigorous networking training at ITAcademy, and hands-on corporate IT experience at BHRT. I combine this operational foundation with continuous professional upskilling to tackle complex technical challenges.
process.v3Desc: I bridge traditional system administration with modern automation, leveraging Python, Bash, and PowerShell scripting to streamline cross-platform workflows, optimize system performance, and minimize manual operational overhead.

stack.title: Technical Stack
stack.description: The technologies I leverage to build, deploy, and secure modern web solutions—chosen for their performance, security, and operational efficiency.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.description: Insight into my engineering background and professional approach.
faq.a1: I am a certified Computer Network Administrator (ITAcademy) with a technical background in Electronics (Railway School Center Sarajevo). My professional experience includes a tenure at BHRT, where I was responsible for end-to-end corporate IT support. This involved managing Windows client environments, hardware maintenance, network troubleshooting, and server-side administration—ranging from user management to the deployment and hardening of Linux-based infrastructure. I actively transformed manual operational hurdles into efficient, automated workflows, including the creation of centralized operational dashboards that streamlined field interventions.
faq.q2: What technologies do you focus on?
faq.a2: My core expertise lies in enterprise IT support, systems hardening, and network administration. I scale these operations using Python, Bash, and PowerShell for automation, while utilizing modern frameworks like Astro, React, and Next.js to develop performant technical documentation platforms and knowledge bases that house my systems engineering guides, security research, and development projects.
faq.q3: Do you have any competitive achievements?
faq.a3: Yes — I am a three-time national champion at the Festival Rada technical exhibition, recognized for innovative IoT and embedded systems engineering, including an IoT Wi-Fi Scoreboard, a Solar Tree energy station, and a Programmable LED Desk.
faq.a4: I hold professional credentials in Network Administration, advanced Python, and C2-level English (EF SET). Additionally, I have completed a specialized suite of Anthropic certifications focused on Model Context Protocol (MCP) and agentic workflow integration.
faq.q5: Do you use AI in your work?
faq.a5: AI is a central pillar of my engineering workflow. I use it as a collaborative partner for architecture reviews, complex script validation, and infrastructure automation. My work with the Model Context Protocol (MCP) allows me to bridge AI intelligence with real-world system data, significantly increasing operational speed and accuracy.
faq.q6: Are you a company or freelancer?
faq.a6: I am an independent IT professional seeking to integrate directly into established, high-impact corporate teams. My goal is to contribute my skills to global tech leaders like Google, Rockstar Games, Naughty Dog, Adobe, or Microsoft—organizations where I can focus on large-scale infrastructure, complex systems, and industry-defining projects without intermediary hurdles.
faq.q7: What kind of positions do you look for?
faq.a7: I target roles in corporate IT operations, systems administration, and cybersecurity hardening. I thrive in environments that require robust support strategies and proactive infrastructure management, with a clear path toward specialized security and systems engineering.
faq.q8: Do you work with international companies?
faq.a8: Yes, I am actively seeking to transition into international roles. While currently based in Sarajevo, I am fully prepared for relocation to support on-site operations or to integrate into global, distributed teams via remote work. With C2-level English proficiency and a background in high-demand environments, I am ready to bring my expertise to a global stage.
